title: Retrospective Analysis of Definitive Chemoradiotherapy With FOLFOX in Patients With Esophageal Cancer Intolerant to Cisplatin.
abstract: Definitive chemoradiotherapy with cisplatin (CDDP) plus 5-fluorouracil is the standard treatment for locally advanced esophageal squamous cell carcinoma (LA-ESCC); however, CDDP is unsuitable for patients with cardiac and/or renal dysfunction. Based on the results of the PRODIGE5/ACCORD17 trial, 5-fluorouracil and leucovorin with oxaliplatin plus radiotherapy (FOLFOX-RT) has been recognized as a treatment option. However, the efficacy and safety of FOLFOX-RT is still unclear in Japan.
